label: Event Launch
summary: Starter launch pack for preparing a public event page, outbound notifications, and webhook-routed follow-up actions.

inputs.name: event_brief
inputs.description: Event purpose, schedule, and publish context.

inputs.name: release_binder
inputs.description: Binder anchor used for downstream workflow routing.
